ucs.title: [LLM] Cl0p / Lace Tempest LEMURLOOT web shell on MOVEit Transfer (CVE-2023-34362) post-exploitation
ucs.description: Hunts the signature Cl0p (TA505 / FIN11 / GRACEFUL SPIDER / Microsoft-tracked Lace Tempest) intrusion pattern from May 2023 onward: SQL-injection drop of the LEMURLOOT ASPX web shell (`human2.aspx` and randomly-named .aspx siblings) into the MOVEit Transfer wwwroot, followed by IIS `w3wp.exe` spawning cmd/PowerShell/sqlcmd to enumerate and exfiltrate the MOVEit MySQL/Azure-SQL backing store. Also catches the same actor's pivot to GoAnywhere MFT (CVE-2023-0669), PaperCut (CVE-2023-27350) and Cleo Harmony/VLTrader/LexiCom (CVE-2024-50623 / CVE-2024-55956) where `LexiCom.exe`/`java.exe` drops `he
ucs.splunk: (`tstats` summariesonly=true count min(_time) as firstTime max(_time) as lastTime values(Filesystem.file_path) as file_path values(Filesystem.process_name) as process_name from datamodel=Endpoint.Filesystem where (Filesystem.file_path="*\\MOVEit Transfer\\wwwroot\\*" Filesystem.file_name IN ("human2.aspx","human.aspx","LEMURLOOT*")) OR (Filesystem.file_path IN ("*\\LexiCom\\autorun\\*","*\\Harmony\\autorun\\*","*\\VLTrader\\autorun\\*") AND Filesystem.file_name IN ("healthchecktemplate.txt","healthcheck.txt","main.xml")) OR (Filesystem.file_path="*GoAnywhere*" Filesystem.file_name="*.zip") by host Filesystem.file_name Filesystem.file_path Filesystem.process_name) | rename Filesystem.* as * | append [ `tstats` summariesonly=true count min(_time) as firstTime max(_time) as lastTime values(Processes.parent_process_name) as parent values(Processes.process) as cmdline values(Processes.user) as user from datamodel=Endpoint.Processes where Processes.parent_process_name IN ("w3wp.exe","LexiCom.exe","VLTrader.exe","Harmony.exe","java.exe","GoAnywhere*","tomcat*.exe") Processes.process_name IN ("cmd.exe","powershell.exe","pwsh.exe","sqlcmd.exe","bcp.exe","certutil.exe","bitsadmin.exe","rundll32.exe") by host Processes.process_name Processes.parent_process_name Processes.user] | convert ctime(firstTime) ctime(lastTime) | sort - lastTime
ucs.kql:
// Cl0p (Lace Tempest) MFT-appliance web shell + post-exploitation child process
let lookback = 30d;
// (1) Web-shell / autorun artefact drops on MOVEit, GoAnywhere, Cleo
let shellDrops =
    DeviceFileEvents
    | where Timestamp > ago(lookback)
    | where ActionType in ("FileCreated","FileRenamed","FileModified")
    | where (FolderPath has @"\MOVEit Transfer\wwwroot\"
             and (FileName in~ ("human2.aspx","human.aspx")
                  or FileName matches regex @"(?i)^[a-f0-9]{8,16}\.aspx$"))
        or (FolderPath has_any (@"\LexiCom\autorun\", @"\Harmony\autorun\", @"\VLTrader\autorun\")
             and FileName in~ ("healthchecktemplate.txt","healthcheck.txt","main.xml","60282967-dc91-40ef-a34c-38e992509c2c.xml"))
        or (FolderPath has @"\GoAnywhere\" and FileName endswith ".jsp")
    | project Timestamp, DeviceName, ActionType, FileName, FolderPath,
              InitiatingProcessFileName, InitiatingProcessCommandLine,
              InitiatingProcessAccountName, SHA256;
// (2) MFT-host service spawning a shell or DB CLI = post-exploit hands-on-keyboard
let shellSpawns =
    DeviceProcessEvents
    | where Timestamp > ago(lookback)
    | where InitiatingProcessFileName in~
        ("w3wp.exe","LexiCom.exe","VLTrader.exe","Harmony.exe","java.exe","tomcat10.exe","tomcat9.exe")
    | where InitiatingProcessFolderPath has_any
        (@"\MOVEit Transfer\", @"\Progress\", @"\LexiCom\", @"\Harmony\",
         @"\VLTrader\", @"\GoAnywhere\", @"\Cleo\")
    | where FileName in~ ("cmd.exe","powershell.exe","pwsh.exe","sqlcmd.exe",
                          "bcp.exe","certutil.exe","bitsadmin.exe","curl.exe",
                          "rundll32.exe","regsvr32.exe","wscript.exe","cscript.exe")
    | project Timestamp, DeviceName, AccountName,
              ParentImage = InitiatingProcessFolderPath,
              ParentCmd   = InitiatingProcessCommandLine,
              ChildImage  = FolderPath,
              ChildCmd    = ProcessCommandLine, SHA256;
union isfuzzy=true
    (shellDrops    | extend Signal = "WebShell/AutorunDrop"),
    (shellSpawns   | extend Signal = "MFT-Shell-Spawn")
| order by Timestamp desc
ucs.sentinel_kql:
// Cl0p (Lace Tempest) MFT post-exploitation — Sentinel via SecurityEvent (4688) + ImFileEvent
let lookback = 30d;
let shellDrops =
    ImFileEvent
    | where TimeGenerated > ago(lookback)
    | where EventType in ("FileCreated","FileRenamed","FileModified")
    | where (TargetFilePath has @"\MOVEit Transfer\wwwroot\"
             and (TargetFileName in~ ("human2.aspx","human.aspx")
                  or TargetFileName matches regex @"(?i)^[a-f0-9]{8,16}\.aspx$"))
        or (TargetFilePath has_any (@"\LexiCom\autorun\", @"\Harmony\autorun\", @"\VLTrader\autorun\")
             and TargetFileName in~ ("healthchecktemplate.txt","healthcheck.txt","main.xml"))
        or (TargetFilePath has @"\GoAnywhere\" and TargetFileName endswith ".jsp")
    | project TimeGenerated, DvcHostname, EventType, TargetFileName, TargetFilePath,
              ActingProcessName, ActingProcessCommandLine, ActorUsername, TargetFileSHA256
    | extend Signal = "WebShell/AutorunDrop";
let shellSpawns =
    SecurityEvent
    | where TimeGenerated > ago(lookback)
    | where EventID == 4688
    | where ParentProcessName has_any ("w3wp.exe","LexiCom.exe","VLTrader.exe","Harmony.exe",
                                       "java.exe","tomcat10.exe","tomcat9.exe")
    | where ParentProcessName has_any ("\\MOVEit Transfer\\","\\Progress\\","\\LexiCom\\",
                                       "\\Harmony\\","\\VLTrader\\","\\GoAnywhere\\","\\Cleo\\")
    | where NewProcessName endswith_cs "\\cmd.exe"
         or NewProcessName endswith_cs "\\powershell.exe"
         or NewProcessName endswith_cs "\\pwsh.exe"
         or NewProcessName endswith_cs "\\sqlcmd.exe"
         or NewProcessName endswith_cs "\\bcp.exe"
         or NewProcessName endswith_cs "\\certutil.exe"
         or NewProcessName endswith_cs "\\bitsadmin.exe"
         or NewProcessName endswith_cs "\\curl.exe"
         or NewProcessName endswith_cs "\\rundll32.exe"
         or NewProcessName endswith_cs "\\regsvr32.exe"
    | project TimeGenerated, Computer, Account, ParentProcessName, NewProcessName,
              CommandLine, TokenElevationType
    | extend Signal = "MFT-Shell-Spawn";
union isfuzzy=true shellDrops, shellSpawns
| order by TimeGenerated desc
ucs.sigma_yaml:
title: Cl0p / Lace Tempest MFT Web Shell or Autorun Artifact Dropped
id: 8c0f1bd7-4c11-4e6e-9d06-2f3fa3a4c0c1
status: experimental
description: Detects file artefacts associated with Cl0p (TA505 / FIN11 / GRACEFUL SPIDER / Lace Tempest) mass-exploitation of managed-file-transfer appliances - MOVEit Transfer LEMURLOOT (CVE-2023-34362), Cleo Harmony/VLTrader/LexiCom autorun abuse (CVE-2024-50623, CVE-2024-55956) and GoAnywhere MFT (CVE-2023-0669).
references:
  - https://www.microsoft.com/en-us/security/blog/2023/06/07/clop-ransomware-moveit-transfer-zero-day/
  - https://www.mandiant.com/resources/blog/lemurloot-moveit-transfer
  - https://www.huntress.com/blog/threat-advisory-oh-no-cleo-cleo-software-actively-being-exploited-in-the-wild
author: SOC Detection Engineering
date: 2026/05/03
tags:
  - attack.initial_access
  - attack.persistence
  - attack.t1190
  - attack.t1505.003
  - threat.cl0p
  - threat.lace_tempest
logsource:
  category: file_event
  product: windows
detection:
  moveit_lemurloot:
    TargetFilename|contains: '\MOVEit Transfer\wwwroot\'
    TargetFilename|endswith:
      - '\human2.aspx'
      - '\human.aspx'
  cleo_autorun:
    TargetFilename|contains:
      - '\LexiCom\autorun\'
      - '\Harmony\autorun\'
      - '\VLTrader\autorun\'
    TargetFilename|endswith:
      - 'healthchecktemplate.txt'
      - 'healthcheck.txt'
      - 'main.xml'
  goanywhere_jsp:
    TargetFilename|contains: '\GoAnywhere\'
    TargetFilename|endswith: '.jsp'
  condition: moveit_lemurloot or cleo_autorun or goanywhere_jsp
falsepositives:
  - Vendor product upgrades (verify SHA256 against vendor advisory hashes)
  - Legitimate Cleo autorun integrations - validate file content is not a base64 PowerShell payload
level: high
ucs.rationale: Cl0p does not phish-and-encrypt like an average e-crime crew - their defining tradecraft 2020-2025 has been mass zero-day exploitation of managed-file-transfer appliances (Accellion FTA, GoAnywhere MFT, MOVEit Transfer, PaperCut, Cleo Harmony/VLTrader/LexiCom) followed by data-theft-only extortion. Each campaign produces a distinct, well-documented filesystem footprint: LEMURLOOT (`human2.aspx`) o

ucs.title: [LLM] Cl0p / TA505 Truebot loader → FlawedGrace / Cobalt Strike beacon staging
ucs.description: Cl0p's pre-MFT-era access vector and still-active secondary path: TA505-attributed `Truebot` (aka Silence.Downloader) downloader delivered via spear-phish or drive-by, persisting under a randomized name in `%PROGRAMDATA%\` or `%APPDATA%\Local\`, then sideloading FlawedGrace RAT or staging a Cobalt Strike beacon prior to Cl0p ransomware encryption. CISA AA23-187A and CrowdStrike GRACEFUL SPIDER reporting documents this exact chain - a renamed binary running from ProgramData with a 32-char hex parent that beacons to a hard-coded high-port over HTTP/TLS.
ucs.splunk: `tstats` summariesonly=true count min(_time) as firstTime max(_time) as lastTime values(Processes.process) as cmdline values(Processes.parent_process) as parent_cmd from datamodel=Endpoint.Processes where (Processes.parent_process_name IN ("rundll32.exe","regsvr32.exe") AND Processes.process_path IN ("*\\ProgramData\\*","*\\AppData\\Local\\Temp\\*","*\\AppData\\Roaming\\*") AND match(Processes.process_name,"^[a-f0-9]{6,12}\.(exe|dll)$")) OR (Processes.process_name IN ("powershell.exe","pwsh.exe") AND (Processes.process="*-EncodedCommand*" OR Processes.process="*DownloadString*" OR Processes.process="*FlawedGrace*" OR Processes.process="*vssadmin delete shadows*")) by host Processes.user Processes.process_name Processes.parent_process_name Processes.process_path | `drop_dm_object_name(Processes)` | join type=inner host [ `tstats` summariesonly=true count from datamodel=Network_Traffic.All_Traffic where (All_Traffic.dest_port IN (443,80,8080,8443) AND NOT cidrmatch("10.0.0.0/8",All_Traffic.dest) AND NOT cidrmatch("172.16.0.0/12",All_Traffic.dest) AND NOT cidrmatch("192.168.0.0/16",All_Traffic.dest) AND All_Traffic.bytes_out>2048) by host All_Traffic.dest All_Traffic.dest_port | `drop_dm_object_name(All_Traffic)` ] | convert ctime(firstTime) ctime(lastTime) | sort - lastTime
ucs.kql:
// Cl0p / TA505 - Truebot loader sideload + outbound beacon (Cobalt Strike / FlawedGrace stage)
let lookback = 7d;
// (1) Random-name DLL/EXE in ProgramData or %AppData% loaded by rundll32/regsvr32 - Truebot signature
let truebotLoad =
    DeviceProcessEvents
    | where Timestamp > ago(lookback)
    | where InitiatingProcessFileName in~ ("rundll32.exe","regsvr32.exe")
    | where FolderPath has_any (@"\ProgramData\", @"\AppData\Local\Temp\", @"\AppData\Roaming\")
    | where FileName matches regex @"(?i)^[a-f0-9]{6,12}\.(exe|dll)$"
         or InitiatingProcessCommandLine matches regex @"(?i)rundll32(\.exe)?\s+"".*\\(ProgramData|AppData)\\.*\.dll"",?\s*\w+"
    | project TruebotTime = Timestamp, DeviceId, DeviceName, AccountName,
              FileName, FolderPath,
              ParentCmd = InitiatingProcessCommandLine,
              ChildCmd  = ProcessCommandLine, SHA256;
// (2) Same host spawning the Cl0p shadow-copy/encryption prelude OR egressing to a non-corp public IP shortly after
let ransomwarePrep =
    DeviceProcessEvents
    | where Timestamp > ago(lookback)
    | where (FileName =~ "vssadmin.exe" and ProcessCommandLine has_all ("delete","shadows"))
        or (FileName =~ "wmic.exe" and ProcessCommandLine has_all ("shadowcopy","delete"))
        or (FileName =~ "bcdedit.exe" and ProcessCommandLine has_any ("recoveryenabled No","bootstatuspolicy ignoreallfailures"))
        or (FileName in~ ("powershell.exe","pwsh.exe")
            and ProcessCommandLine has_any ("Get-WmiObject Win32_Shadowcopy","Remove-WmiObject Win32_Shadowcopy"))
    | project RansTime = Timestamp, DeviceId, RansCmd = ProcessCommandLine, RansParent = InitiatingProcessFileName;
let beacon =
    DeviceNetworkEvents
    | where Timestamp > ago(lookback)
    | where ActionType in ("ConnectionSuccess","ConnectionAttempt")
    | where RemoteIPType == "Public"
    | where RemotePort in (80,443,8080,8443,8443,4444,8888,50050)
    | where InitiatingProcessFileName in~ ("rundll32.exe","regsvr32.exe","powershell.exe","pwsh.exe")
    | where InitiatingProcessFolderPath has_any (@"\ProgramData\", @"\AppData\")
        or InitiatingProcessCommandLine has_any (@"\ProgramData\",@"\AppData\")
    | project NetTime = Timestamp, DeviceId, RemoteIP, RemoteUrl, RemotePort,
              NetParent = InitiatingProcessFileName;
truebotLoad
| join kind=inner beacon on DeviceId
| where NetTime between (TruebotTime .. TruebotTime + 30m)
| join kind=leftouter ransomwarePrep on DeviceId
| where isnull(RansTime) or RansTime between (TruebotTime .. TruebotTime + 24h)
| project TruebotTime, NetTime, RansTime, DeviceName, AccountName,
          FileName, FolderPath, ParentCmd, ChildCmd,
          RemoteIP, RemoteUrl, RemotePort, RansCmd, SHA256
| order by TruebotTime desc
ucs.sentinel_kql:
// Cl0p / TA505 - Truebot loader + outbound beacon + shadow-copy wipe (Sentinel SecurityEvent + CommonSecurityLog)
let lookback = 7d;
let truebotLoad =
    SecurityEvent
    | where TimeGenerated > ago(lookback)
    | where EventID == 4688
    | where ParentProcessName endswith_cs "\\rundll32.exe" or ParentProcessName endswith_cs "\\regsvr32.exe"
    | where NewProcessName has_any ("\\ProgramData\\","\\AppData\\Local\\Temp\\","\\AppData\\Roaming\\")
    | where NewProcessName matches regex @"(?i)\\[a-f0-9]{6,12}\.(exe|dll)$"
         or CommandLine matches regex @"(?i)rundll32(\.exe)?\s+"".*\\(ProgramData|AppData)\\.*\.dll"",?\s*\w+"
    | project TruebotTime = TimeGenerated, Computer, Account, NewProcessName, CommandLine, ParentProcessName;
let ransomwarePrep =
    SecurityEvent
    | where TimeGenerated > ago(lookback)
    | where EventID == 4688
    | where (NewProcessName endswith_cs "\\vssadmin.exe" and CommandLine has_all ("delete","shadows"))
         or (NewProcessName endswith_cs "\\wmic.exe" and CommandLine has_all ("shadowcopy","delete"))
         or (NewProcessName endswith_cs "\\bcdedit.exe" and CommandLine has_any ("recoveryenabled No","bootstatuspolicy ignoreallfailures"))
         or ((NewProcessName endswith_cs "\\powershell.exe" or NewProcessName endswith_cs "\\pwsh.exe")
             and CommandLine has_any ("Get-WmiObject Win32_Shadowcopy","Remove-WmiObject Win32_Shadowcopy"))
    | project RansTime = TimeGenerated, Computer, RansCmd = CommandLine, RansParent = ParentProcessName;
let beacon =
    CommonSecurityLog
    | where TimeGenerated > ago(lookback)
    | where DeviceAction in~ ("allow","accept","permit")
    | where DestinationPort in (80,443,8080,8443,4444,8888,50050)
    | where ipv4_is_private(DestinationIP) == false
    | where SentBytes > 2048
    | project NetTime = TimeGenerated, Computer = SourceHostName, RemoteIP = DestinationIP, RemotePort = DestinationPort, RequestURL;
truebotLoad
| join kind=inner beacon on Computer
| where NetTime between (TruebotTime .. TruebotTime + 30m)
| join kind=leftouter ransomwarePrep on Computer
| where isnull(RansTime) or RansTime between (TruebotTime .. TruebotTime + 24h)
| project TruebotTime, NetTime, RansTime, Computer, Account, NewProcessName, CommandLine,
          ParentProcessName, RemoteIP, RemotePort, RequestURL, RansCmd
| order by TruebotTime desc
ucs.rationale: Cl0p's affiliate operations (TA505 / GRACEFUL SPIDER) re-use the Truebot → FlawedGrace → Cobalt Strike → Cl0p encryptor chain documented in CISA AA23-187A and Mandiant/CrowdStrike reporting. The defining behavioural fingerprint is rundll32/regsvr32 sideloading a 6–12 character hex-named DLL out of ProgramData or AppData (Truebot's persistence pattern), followed within minutes by an outbound non-co
